subcodes.title: Words to Mr King from Seattle, spoken on 1912-10-24
subcodes.first_line: Unless a man give his whole thought to a subject, he cannot comprehend it fully. He must give his mind to the thing, be free, and then he will understand it.
subcodes.subjects: @effort; striving, @study; deepening, @independent investigation of truth; reality, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
